introduction: SYNOPSISAfter getting engaged, Young-shin goes to other city where he gets into an accident and loses his manhood. When he tries to break off his engagement, Eun-ok, Young-shin's fiancee, refuses to give up on him. Worshiping Young-shin, Eun-ok convinces him that sex is only a part of life and they get married. Obsessed with protecting his wife as she suffers from insomnia night after night, Young-shin's mental health deteriorates to the point where he decides to put up a fence around his villa. One of the workers putting up the fence is Hyun-jun, a college student working part-time. He and Eun-ok have an affair. When Hyun-jun finds out about Eun-ok's situation, he coaxes her to leave the villa with him. Having struggling with the idea, Eun-ok finally decides to escape the villa but society's morals will not pardon her.故事接合和精神eunok留给吐爱情失去了应有的事故和性别做，精神信仰是想强调的是说服pahon拒绝精神的报价和城堡作为生活的一部分，它会导致婚姻。这发生在保留您的妻子每天晚上吹的本能最终决定安装栅栏销赃不小屋的精神和心理健康痴迷。肇事之间该工人到大学兼职炫和eunok和拉客睡着了离开别墅尤诺·海事项的知识，eunok是痛苦，而人类冲突是所有别墅的社会伦理道德，以一个后她逃跑不要容忍。
